terms.name: CanonForge
terms.definition: Permanent constitutional engine for architecture, schemas, APIs, and build packages

terms.name: Evolution Proposal
terms.definition: Evidence-backed proposal for institutional improvement under Human governance

terms.name: Constitutional Impact
terms.definition: Classification of whether evolution affects constitution, policy, or implementation only

terms.name: Canon Registry
terms.definition: Authoritative registry where nothing exists outside Canon

terms.name: Build Genome
terms.definition: Institution blueprint storing architecture, schemas, APIs, and platform DNA

terms.name: Drift Detection
terms.definition: Continuous monitoring for documentation, schema, API, and policy divergence

terms.name: Architecture Review
terms.definition: Measurable evaluation of complexity, coupling, security, and maintainability

terms.name: Digital Twin
terms.definition: Simulation of institution load, growth, and restructuring for planning

terms.name: Future Build Queue
terms.definition: Structured queue of approved ideas, debt, and innovation for future builds

terms.name: Factory Engine
terms.definition: Generates certified deployment packages from Canon

terms.name: Institution Cloning
terms.definition: Generation of new institutions from certified Canon foundation

terms.name: Living Documentation
terms.definition: Documentation synchronized with schemas, APIs, events, and services

terms.name: Global Traceability
terms.definition: Backward why and forward dependency analysis for every object

terms.name: Canon Versioning
terms.definition: Major, minor, patch, experimental, and federation extension versions

terms.name: Platform DNA
terms.definition: Permanent record of purpose, principles, philosophy, and trust model

terms.name: AI Evolution Advisor
terms.definition: Advisory AI that proposes improvements while Humans govern constitutional decisions

terms.name: Research Engine
terms.definition: Tracks academic, community, industry, and legal research feeding Canon evolution

terms.name: Canon Quality Gates
terms.definition: Evidence, review, testing, documentation, and approval required for every Canon change

terms.name: Federation Evolution
terms.definition: Shared standards and architecture without forcing institutional uniformity

terms.name: LocalBrain
terms.definition: Portable institutional node with memory, calendar, knowledge, and AI context
